info.name: Souvenirs
info.summary: Create, Display and Share "old school" albums for your photos, videos and panoramics, on your Nextcloud server.
info.description:
Relive your memories the way you used to with paper albums: page after page, story after story.
**Souvenirs** lets you craft "old school" albums from the photos and videos already stored on your Nextcloud — and share them with the people who matter.
### ✨ What you can do
- 📖 **Browse albums like a book** — turn pages instead of scrolling through photo grids - 🎨 **Create and edit albums** right from the web interface: pick your photos, arrange your pages, give each album a name and a date - 🎬 **Mix media freely** — photos, videos, audio recordings and even 360° panoramas on the same page - 🌐 **Explore panoramas** interactively thanks to the integrated 360° viewer - 🔗 **Share with a simple link** — family and friends can enjoy your albums without a Nextcloud account - 📱 **Pair with the [Souvenirs Android app](https://github.com/zorgluf/souvenirs-android)** to build albums on the go and sync them with your server - ♻️ **Save space** — media already on your server is reused, not duplicated
### 🔒 Your souvenirs, your server
Albums are stored as plain folders and files on your own Nextcloud. No third-party service, no lock-in: your souvenirs stay yours.
info.author: Francois Valley
